holdings.infoBox: OAKI is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sunbelt Rentals Holdings stock at 3.96%, adidas AG at 3.93%, BNP Paribas at 3.92%, Compass Group at 3.22%, and Symrise AG at 3.20%.

overview.description: The Oakmark International Large Cap ETF (OAKI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth through an actively managed global ex-US portfolio of large-cap companies. Companies are selected based on an investment philosophy that includes quality and value factors. OAKI was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Oakmark.
